description: peer-send unicast happy path: alice@__CWD__ sends --message 'hello' --to bob --message-id <fixed ULID> in a cwd-only degenerate room. Bob's last_seen_at is pinned far in the future so the staleness check + inference logic pass deterministically regardless of wall clock. No pair_key / peer_rooms rows means cwd-degenerate room accounting.
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alice', 'claude', 'peer', 'alice-key', NULL, '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z'); INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, session_key, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'bob', 'claude', 'peer', 'bob-key', NULL, '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2099-01-01T00:00:00Z');
